Content: *p78393a01828* do not write in this area    do not write in this area          do not write in this area 18            *(d)  carbonyl compounds can be identified from their  2,4 dinitrophenylhydrazine derivatives.     describe this process, including in your answer    observations you would see in the formation of the  2,4 dinitrophenylhydrazine derivative    an outline of the steps used to separate and purify the derivative, giving the  purpose of each step    how the derivative is used to identify the original carbonyl compound.     detailed descriptions of practical techniques are not required.
